name: trend-sparkline
title: Trend Sparkline
description: Tiny inline SVG trend line for vitals and tracking series, with optional threshold shading.

props.name: thresholdMin
props.description: Shades the region below this value; the threshold is included in the y-domain so the band stays visible.

props.name: thresholdMax
props.description: Shades the region above this value.

props.name: showLastPoint
props.description: Highlight the most recent point with a dot.

clinicalNotes: The auto aria-label summarizes direction (first vs last value, ±2% tolerance), last value, and reading count — a sparkline is a shape, so the numbers must exist in text. Threshold bands mark regions outside the acceptable range and extend the y-domain so they remain visible even when all readings are in range. This is a glanceable trend, not a chart: no axes, no interpolation claims — pair it with the actual latest value and unit in adjacent text, as in the demo.
notes: Ported from petals_ui unchanged apart from import paths.
